content_review: COMPLETE — all 10 authoritative files verified to exist in repo. 7 files read in full or materially sampled (report_compiler_v1.py 785 lines, builders.py 352 lines, explainability_builder.py 396 lines, orchestrator.py key sections, page.tsx 712 lines, InsightPanel.tsx 158 lines, state_engine_v1.py contract, analysis.ts types). Remaining 3 (RootCauseEvidenceSummary.tsx, ClusterSummary.tsx, ClinicianReportRenderer.tsx) confirmed to exist. meta.explainability_report confirmed stored at orchestrator.py:2068. meta.insight_graph.system_states confirmed at orchestrator.py:2060 and insight_graph_v1.py:209. system_stable_normal state code confirmed at state_engine.py:~97. meta.burden_vector.system_capacity_scores confirmed at orchestrator.py:~2102.
behaviour_review: COMPLETE — MIXED correct. Balanced systems narrative changes what explanatory content is surfaced and therefore changes emitted user-facing reasoning (BEHAVIOUR tier). Explainability surfacing adds a new bounded section sourced from stored deterministic structures (BEHAVIOUR tier). Analytical logic (ranking, signal evaluation, cluster logic, burden logic, insight graph construction, arbitration) confirmed not in scope. Determinism preserved — balanced narrative derived only from system_states state_codes (sorted by system_id) and system_capacity_scores (deterministic per result). No randomness. No mutable global state. Three determinism risks surfaced: (1) system_states iteration order; (2) hand-authored fallback copy; (3) float display precision for capacity scores.
